//: Security overrides: NEVER downgrade these. basic-ftp <=5.2.2 has DoS in Client.list() (GHSA-rp42-5vxx-qpwr). ip-address <=10.1.0 has XSS in Address6 HTML-emitting methods (GHSA-v2v4-37r5-5v8g / CVE-2026-42338) — pulled in transitively via puppeteer -> @puppeteer/browsers -> proxy-agent -> socks-proxy-agent -> socks. fast-uri <=3.1.1 has path traversal via percent-encoded dot segments (GHSA-q3j6-qgpj-74h6 / CVE-2026-6321) and host confusion via percent-encoded authority delimiters (GHSA-v39h-62p7-jpjc / CVE-2026-6322) — pulled in transitively via html-validate -> ajv and stylelint -> table -> ajv. brace-expansion <1.1.16 and >=3.0.0 <5.0.7 have an exponential-time expansion DoS on consecutive non-expanding {} groups (GHSA-3jxr-9vmj-r5cp); on top of the earlier early-truncation issue for 5.0.0-5.0.5 (GHSA-jxxr-4gwj-5jf2 / CVE-2026-45149). Two VERSION-SELECTOR overrides are used — one for the 1.x line (minimatch@3 in eslint toolchain) and one for the 5.x line (html-validate -> glob -> minimatch -> brace-expansion@5) — so neither line is forced onto the other's major version. Selector overrides (not name-nested) are required because npm 10 and npm 11 resolve nested/scoped overrides differently, producing divergent lockfiles that break `npm ci` across Node versions. ws 8.0.0-8.20.1 has uninitialized-memory disclosure (GHSA-58qx-3vcg-4xpx) and a memory-exhaustion DoS from tiny fragments/data chunks (GHSA-96hv-2xvq-fx4p) — pulled in transitively via puppeteer -> puppeteer-core; pinned to >=8.21.0 (stays within the 8.x line puppeteer-core expects). js-yaml 4.0.0-4.2.0 has a quadratic-complexity DoS in merge-key chains (GHSA-52cp-r559-cp3m); the earlier repeated-alias advisory (GHSA-h67p-54hq-rp68) was patched in 4.2.0 but a new variant affecting 4.2.0 itself was later disclosed — pulled in transitively via eslint -> @eslint/eslintrc and puppeteer -> cosmiconfig; pinned to >=4.3.0 <5.0.0 (4.3.0 is the patched 4.x release, excludes ESM-only breaking 5.0.0).
